title: CR Craft REMASTERED
description: A difficulty-oriented modpack designed to be challenging, inspired by other modpacks like RLCraft and a specific "Minecraft Clone."
body:
![CR CRAFT REMASTERED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8497a1cc14c05a5f6d911cc5fb7becde129aeebd_0.webp)

This is a difficulty-oriented modpack designed to be challenging, inspired by other modpacks like RLCraft and a specific "Minecraft Clone."

The modpack contains plenty of features and game mechanics, some of which are unique and custom-made.

![Progression Changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f31aed3a6fd42b616ea367fa0272a2c9a007dfcc.png)

Some of the progression changes include:

- Slower early game.
- Create Mod integration in some parts of gameplay.
- The Wither is now required to progress.
- The Oceans are no longer useless.

![mob changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1309865df969ad55b5850c584e879a9895880801.png)

The behaviour of mobs has also been changed:

- Creepers are MUCH more agressive.
- Undead mobs seek out loud noises and light.
- Hostile mobs will now employ some devious strategies to end your life.
- The mobs will now raid you every once in a while.
- Sometimes hostile mobs will patrol the world.
- Mobs will now become stronger as time goes by.
- MUCH SMARTER mobs in general.

![Food changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef3454836dcdf213422fd40eba977feaf2d7046f.png)

The food system has also been changed:

- Larger meals are now better.
- Diminishing food returns.
- Regeneration system has been changed.
- Eating some foods RAW will now poison you.

![survival changes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d0618b10f7e3b66fed75b419f0ef3362b82882a_0.webp)

Day to day survival has also changed:

- Added a thirst bar.
- Added a temperature system.
- Lack of oxygen at extreme depths and altitudes.
- Fully custom water pressure system.
- Damage / Injury level system
- Bleeding
- And probably more I forgot.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fcddf858e87fc123b60be6cb7e9d7c21f62e548.png)

I HIGHLY recommend tweaking your graphics settings and adjusting the selection of resource packs to your liking.

NOTE: This Modpack is ment to be more "fair" than RlCraft. No random mob spawning from breaking blocks and ending your run. Pretty much every death IS avoidable if you are aware of your surroundings and don't take too big of risks.

**GOOD LUCK.**

ANOTHER NOTE: This is a continuation of my first modpack found [HERE](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cr-craft). I unfortunately lost access to that account so my only real choice was to make a brand new mod page while also reworking the modpack.
